subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of the Covenant! Thy flowing verses are in truth even as running water and the pure fountain of divine knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مخمور باده میثاق اشعار آبدار که فی الحقیقه چون آب روان بود و سلسبیل عرفان
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @poems and quotation from poetry, @the power of words; of speech
